name: advisys-server
description: Express.js backend API for AdviSys academic consultation management system.

scripts.deploy: gcloud run deploy advisys-api --source . --region YOUR_REGION --project YOUR_PROJECT_ID --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy:env: gcloud run deploy advisys-api --source . --region YOUR_REGION --project YOUR_PROJECT_ID --allow-unauthenticated --set-env-vars=DB_HOST=YOUR_DB_HOST,DB_PORT=3306,DB_USER=YOUR_DB_USER,DB_PASSWORD=YOUR_DB_PASSWORD,DB_NAME=YOUR_DB_NAME,JWT_SECRET=YOUR_JWT_SECRET,SENDGRID_API_KEY=YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY,MAIL_FROM=no-reply@yourdomain.com,MAIL_FROM_NAME=AdviSys,APP_BASE_URL=https://your-frontend-domain,RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES=30

author: Jezreel D.
